agent.name: ux-flow-auditor
agent.role: Re-audit scoped UX/branding after fixed_pending_verify for Penny vs penny (f-122e7405).

findings.title: Product name casing is inconsistent (Penny vs penny)
findings.description: README and dashboard metadata now use title-case "Penny" consistently for user-facing strings (layout default/title template, document.title, footer). Internal storage keys and DOM ids remain lowercase "penny_*" which is appropriate for technical identifiers.

proof_hooks.summary: apps/dashboard/app/layout.tsx metadata.title default "Penny" and template "%s — Penny"
apps/dashboard/app/page.tsx document.title "Portfolio — Penny"; visible footer "Penny v3.0"
README.md H1 "Penny v3.0" aligns with dashboard branding.

history.notes: Re-audit: scoped files show Penny casing aligned with documented decision.

next_actions.action: None for f-122e7405; close in synthesizer and remove from open_findings.
next_actions.rationale: User-visible copy and metadata consistently use Penny.
